problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: If Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
